## Purpose

Describe the objective and problem solved.

## Trace

- Plan: `PLN-...`
- Decisions: `DEC-...` or none
- Work: `WRK-...`
- Review: `REV-...`
- Issue: Closes #

## Verification

- [ ] Project tests, lint, typecheck, and build were run as applicable
- [ ] Validation evidence is recorded in the Work entry
- [ ] `belay sync` completed
- [ ] `belay doctor` passed

## Review Outcome

- [ ] Independent implementation-time review is complete
- [ ] Required findings were addressed or explicitly deferred
- [ ] Human review escalation is recorded when required

## Impact

Describe affected areas, compatibility concerns, rollout risk, and rollback.

## Open Questions

- None

## Merge Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] At least one approval is present
- [ ] Required CI checks are green
- [ ] Squash merge is intended
